prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-CREEKSIDEGPKIT-13PC Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Creekside Gold Panning Kit with Drawstring Backpack and Mini Classifiers, 13pc Description: Strike gold wherever adventure takes you!

This ASR Outdoor gold panning kit is lightweight and easily portable, meaning you walk or hike to just about any river or creek with gold prospecting equipment on your back, and immediately start panning for gold; minimal set up time needed and no assembly required.

All gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit, conveniently fit inside the included ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack, so you can remain hands free when you’re on the go, and easily pack everything out when you’re done for the day.

Designed for use right at the water’s edge, this kit includes a high quality 12 inch dual riffle gold pan that makes capturing gold easier with both shallow and deep riffle walls. The gold panning kit also comes with three essential mini stacking classifiers, to help increase gold recovery efforts by eliminating unwanted raw materials from your paydirt. The included scoop is perfect for digging into creeks and streams, while the fine gold recovery equipment helps in the collection of even the smallest gold flakes and flour.

Lastly, this gold panning kit also includes a compatible stacking classifier storage container to catch paydirt, or securely store any other found valuables like rocks or fossils while exploring in the wild.

Adventure awaits; good luck! Search Terms: Gold panning kit; gold prospecting equipment; gold rush; gold mining equipment; hand tools; soil sifter; drawstring backpack; gold pans; sieve; outdoor gear; camping supplies; gold panning kit for adults; paydirt; sluice box; classifier screen Features: - ADVENTURE GOLD PANNING KIT: Easy to use and highly portable, this gold panning kit features essential gold prospecting equipment for processing small amounts of paydirt quickly and efficiently - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Must have dual riffle gold pan features both shallow and deep riffles, as well as 1/8 inch bottom pan trap, all designed to increase gold flour, flake and gold in nugget recovery one single gold pan - MINI CLASSIFIER SCREEN SET: Essential for removing unwanted materials like gravels and rocks from your paydirt to increase gold yield; this set includes three medium to fine stacking classifier screens and one compatible stacking storage container with lid - DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: All the gold prospecting equipment included with this gold panning kit fit into the included ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack, meaning you hike with your gear to just about any remote location - FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS: Included are a pair of magnifying tweezers, an 8lb magnetic pick up tool, prospectors scoop and more, to help with the extraction and storage of found gold === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13pc Creekside Gold Panning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 12 Inch Dual Riffle Pan, 3 Mini Classifiers, Drawstring Backpack, Fine Gold Recovery Tools

openai.title_differentiation: Drawstring Backpack, 12 Inch Dual Riffle Pan, 3 Stackable Classifiers, Fine Gold Recovery Tools, Storage Container
